docker.customCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export HF_HOME=/workspace/.cache/huggingface; export TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=/workspace/.cache/huggingface; mkdir -p /workspace; cd /workspace; apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates git python3 python3-pip && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*; rm -rf ledgerlab-openenv; git clone --depth 1 --branch main https://github.com/vivek100/ledgerlab-openenv ledgerlab-openenv; cd ledgerlab-openenv; bash scripts/run_h100_training_medium.sh'
